prompt: Add a to-do to buy potting soil, scheduled for this Wednesday.
paraphrases: Put "Buy potting soil" on my list for Wednesday this week.
I need to remember to buy potting soil on Wednesday — add that for me.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE type=0 AND trashed=0 AND status=0 AND title LIKE '%potting soil%' AND startDate=132807424 AND start=1
